  • Konstruktordetails

    • GeneticAlgorithm

      public GeneticAlgorithm()

  • Methodendetails

    • getPopulationSize

      public int getPopulationSize()
      Gibt zurück:
      the size of the population used in the genetic algorithm

    • setPopulationSize

      public void setPopulationSize(int populationSize)
      Parameter:
      populationSize - the number of individuals per generation

    • getMaxGenerations

      public int getMaxGenerations()
      Gibt zurück:
      the maximum number of generations the algorithm may run

    • setMaxGenerations

      public void setMaxGenerations(int maxGenerations)
      Parameter:
      maxGenerations - the upper limit of generations

    • getCrossoverRate

      public double getCrossoverRate()
      Gibt zurück:
      the probability of crossover operations

    • setCrossoverRate

      public void setCrossoverRate(double crossoverRate)
      Parameter:
      crossoverRate - the crossover probability (0.0–1.0)

    • getMutationRate

      public double getMutationRate()
      Gibt zurück:
      the probability of mutation operations

    • setMutationRate

      public void setMutationRate(double mutationRate)
      Parameter:
      mutationRate - the mutation probability (0.0–1.0)

    • getElitismCount

      public int getElitismCount()

    • setElitismCount

      public void setElitismCount(int elitismCount)

      public int getResetThreshold()

    • setResetThreshold

      public void setResetThreshold(int resetThreshold)
